parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Private API key to be provided in the format `Api-Key <key>`.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description:
Report interval

* `daily` - Daily
* `weekly` - Weekly
* `monthly` - Monthly
* `yearly` - Yearly

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The initial index from which to return the results.
